
````{r}
# =======================
# LIBRARIES
# =======================
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)

# =======================
# READ DATA
# =======================
file <- "input_files/Cumulative_absorbance.csv.csv"

df <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    Draxin     = factor(Draxin, levels = c("0", "68")),
    Experiment = factor(Experiment),
    Absorbance = as.numeric(Absorbance)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Absorbance))

# =======================
# MODEL
# =======================
m <- lmer(Absorbance ~ Draxin + (1 | Experiment), data = df)

# =======================
# ESTIMATED MEANS + TEST
# =======================
emm <- emmeans(m, ~ Draxin)

# Only one comparison → simplest + robust
contrast_res <- pairs(emm)

# =======================
# EXPORT
# =======================
write.csv(
  as.data.frame(contrast_res),
  "output/growth_assays/absorbance_68_vs_0.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

print("Done.")
```
